overview.description: The BufferLABS US Equity Dynamic Buffer ETF (BFLB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that employs a dynamic options-based strategy on the large-cap US equity space. The fund aims to provide downside protection in bear markets while capturing more upside than traditional buffered ETFs in bull markets. BFLB was launched on Oct 7, 2025 and is issued by BufferLABS.
